kinyarwanda.sorry_something_went_wrong_try_again: Ihangane, hari ikitagenze neza. Ongera ugerageze!
kinyarwanda.your_equation_click_tile_to_remove: Ingingo yawe (kanda ikaro kugira ngo ukure)
kinyarwanda.click_tiles_above_to_build_an_equation: Kanda amakaro ari hejuru kugira ngo wubake ingingo...
kinyarwanda.value_to_apply_to_both_sides: Agaciro ko gushyira ku mpande zombi
kinyarwanda.ask_the_ai_tutor_anything_about_algebr: Baza umwarimu AI ikintu cyose kuri aljebra!
kinyarwanda.linear_quadratic_factoring_system_simp: Umurongo, kareya, gusesengura, sisitemu, koroshya. AI igaragaza buri ntambwe + itanga izina ry'imiterere yakoreshejwe (igabanya, guhuza ibice bisa, FOIL). Ibibazo bisanzwe bya AP / SAT / Aljebra 1 byose bigabanuka kugeza ku mihindagurikire ~8.
kinyarwanda.multi_difficulty_problem_sets_the_ai_c: Imitwe y'ibibazo y'ubukana butandukanye. AI igenzura igisubizo cyawe kandi inyura mu gisubizo cyuzuye kugira ngo ubone neza aho intambwe zawe zatandukaniye. Yubaka akamenyero ko kwandika imibare, atari ugukeka gusa.
kinyarwanda.pick_variables_operations_target_value: Hitamo impinduka + ibikorwa + agaciro intego; sisitemu ikora ikibazo cya aljebra gihuye n'igishushanyo cyawe. Ifite akamaro ku barimu bakora amapaji y'akazi n'abanyeshuri basesengura inyuma "icyo gituma ikibazo kigora."
kinyarwanda.drag_weights_onto_a_balance_to_model_x: Kurura ibiro ku minzani kugira ngo werekane x + 3 = 7 mu buryo bugaragara. Ubushishozi bw'ingirakamaro cyane kuri aljebra yo hambere — ingingo ni iminzani, si imyanya yuzuye yo kuzuza. Icyo ukora ku ruhande rumwe, gikore ku rundi.
kinyarwanda.ask_the_tutor_about_any_algebra_concep: Baza umwarimu kuri igitekerezo cyose cya aljebra cyangwa intambwe yakwamye. Umwarimu azi urwego rw'ishuri ryawe, kugerageza vuba aha, n'ikibazo gikora. Cyiza cyane ku bibazo "kuki uburyo bwanjye butakoze?"
